_comment: Hard-fork → activated MIPs map. Source: github.com/category-labs/monad/releases (release notes contain a 'MONAD_NINE Activation' / 'MONAD_TEN Activation' section listing MIPs included in each fork). When a new fork ships, append an entry here; the governance scraper overrides forum-derived status for these MIPs to 'Activated' and exposes the activation timestamp + fork name to the frontend.
_format: fork_name → { mips:[MIP-N strings], testnet_activation_ts: unix, mainnet_activation_ts: unix, source_url: <release_notes>}. Set testnet/mainnet ts to null if the fork hasn't yet activated on that network.
